data.queryValue:
WITH
-- 0) Параметры DataLens
list_p AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN regexp_replace($$ {{geo_list}} $$, 'E''|''|\(|\)|\s', '', 'g') = ''
        THEN NULL
      ELSE string_to_array(
             regexp_replace($$ {{geo_list}} $$, 'E''|''|\(|\)|\s', '', 'g'),
             ','
           )::text[]
    END AS geo_arr,
    CASE
      WHEN regexp_replace($$ {{utm_list}} $$, 'E''|''|\(|\)|\s', '', 'g') = ''
        THEN NULL
      ELSE string_to_array(
             regexp_replace($$ {{utm_list}} $$, 'E''|''|\(|\)|\s', '', 'g'),
             ','
           )::text[]
    END AS utm_arr
),
param_p AS (
  -- окно склейки покупок в «сессию», дней (напр., 14)
  SELECT COALESCE({{date_book_interval}}, 0)::int AS book_window_days
),

/* A) Маппинг person_key -> первая СДЕЛКА (creation) и её utmsource */
first_deal_rows AS (
  SELECT
    cp.person_key,
    l.creation_date_time::timestamp AS first_deal_dt,
    NULLIF(trim(l.utmsource), '')   AS utmsource
  FROM mart.parent_child_leads l
  JOIN mart.v_person_key cp
    ON cp.account_id      = l.account_id
   AND cp.contacts_amo_id = l.contacts_amo_id
  WHERE l.creation_date_time IS NOT NULL
),
first_deal_global AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (f.person_key)
         f.person_key,
         f.first_deal_dt,
         COALESCE(f.utmsource, 'unknown') AS first_deal_utmsource
  FROM first_deal_rows f
  ORDER BY f.person_key, f.first_deal_dt
),

-- 1) Покупки для отчёта (GEO + интервал) из мат.вью + ФИЛЬТР по источнику ПЕРВОЙ СДЕЛКИ
report_pp AS (
  SELECT
    v.person_key,
    v.crm_id,
    v.booking_date,
    v.deal_amount,
    v.revenue,
    v.geo,
    v.prev_booking_date
  FROM v_person_purchases_prev v
  /* было: JOIN first_deal_global fdg USING (person_key) */
  LEFT JOIN first_deal_global fdg USING (person_key)
  CROSS JOIN list_p lp
  WHERE v.geo IN ('ОАЭ','Москва','Грузия','Таиланд','Бали','Таиланд Eng')
    AND (lp.geo_arr IS NULL OR v.geo = ANY(lp.geo_arr))                 -- GEO-фильтр
    AND (lp.utm_arr IS NULL OR fdg.first_deal_utmsource = ANY(lp.utm_arr)) -- UTM-фильтр (мягкий)
    AND v.booking_date >= {{interval_from}}::date
    AND v.booking_date <  {{interval_to}}::date
),

-- 2) Первая покупка клиента в интервале (для сравнения с прошлым)
min_interval_purchase AS (
  SELECT person_key, MIN(booking_date) AS min_interval_booking_date
  FROM report_pp
  GROUP BY person_key
),

-- 3) Последняя ГЛОБАЛЬНАЯ покупка ДО первой в интервале
prev_global_before AS (
  SELECT
    mip.person_key,
    MAX(v.booking_date) AS prev_before
  FROM min_interval_purchase mip
  JOIN v_person_purchases_prev v
    ON v.person_key = mip.person_key
   AND v.booking_date < mip.min_interval_booking_date
  GROUP BY mip.person_key
),

-- 4) Старты сессий ВНУТРИ интервала (по prev_booking_date и разрыву > N) из покупок отчёта
interval_starts AS (
  SELECT
    r.person_key,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (
      WHERE r.prev_booking_date IS NULL
         OR (r.booking_date - r.prev_booking_date) >
            ((SELECT book_window_days::text FROM param_p) || ' days')::interval
    ) AS cnt_interval_episodes,
    MIN(r.booking_date) FILTER (
      WHERE r.prev_booking_date IS NULL
         OR (r.booking_date - r.prev_booking_date) >
            ((SELECT book_window_days::text FROM param_p) || ' days')::interval
    ) AS first_episode_in_interval_start
  FROM report_pp r
  GROUP BY r.person_key
),

-- 5) Группы по согласованной логике
person_groups AS (
  SELECT
    mip.person_key,
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(isf.cnt_interval_episodes, 0) >= 2 THEN 'Повторная покупка'
      WHEN pgb.prev_before IS NOT NULL
           AND (mip.min_interval_booking_date - pgb.prev_before) >
               ((SELECT book_window_days::text FROM param_p) || ' days')::interval
        THEN 'Повторная покупка'
      ELSE 'Одна покупка'
    END AS purchase_group
  FROM min_interval_purchase mip
  LEFT JOIN prev_global_before pgb ON pgb.person_key = mip.person_key
  LEFT JOIN interval_starts  isf ON isf.person_key = mip.person_key
),

-- 6) Сводка по покупкам (агрегируем ПО ПОКУПКАМ отчётного набора; по person_groups)
purchases_summary AS (
  SELECT
    pg.purchase_group,
    COUNT(DISTINCT r.person_key) AS contacts_count,
    COUNT(*)                     AS bookings_count,
    SUM(r.deal_amount)           AS total_deal_amount,
    SUM(r.revenue)               AS total_revenue,
    AVG(r.deal_amount)           AS avg_deal_amount,
    AVG(r.revenue)               AS avg_revenue
  FROM report_pp r
  JOIN person_groups pg ON pg.person_key = r.person_key
  GROUP BY pg.purchase_group
),

-- === Блок RR «как в sql2» (унаследует тот же фильтр utm через report_pp) ===
persons_in_scope AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT person_key FROM report_pp
),
episodes_global_scoped AS (
  SELECT
    v.person_key,
    v.booking_date AS episode_start
  FROM v_person_purchases_prev v
  JOIN persons_in_scope s USING (person_key)
  WHERE v.prev_booking_date IS NULL
     OR (v.booking_date - v.prev_booking_date) >
        ((SELECT book_window_days::text FROM param_p) || ' days')::interval
),
episodes_bounds_scoped AS (
  SELECT
    eg.person_key,
    eg.episode_start,
    LEAD(eg.episode_start) OVER (PARTITION BY eg.person_key ORDER BY eg.episode_start) AS next_episode_start
  FROM episodes_global_scoped eg
),
sessions_in_interval_geo AS (
  SELECT
    eb.person_key,
    COUNT(DISTINCT eb.episode_start) AS cnt_sessions_in_interval
  FROM episodes_bounds_scoped eb
  WHERE eb.episode_start >= {{interval_from}}::date
    AND eb.episode_start <  {{interval_to}}::date
    AND EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM report_pp r
      WHERE r.person_key = eb.person_key
        AND r.booking_date >= eb.episode_start
        AND (eb.next_episode_start IS NULL OR r.booking_date < eb.next_episode_start)
    )
  GROUP BY eb.person_key
),
first_episode_all_scoped AS (
  SELECT person_key, MIN(episode_start) AS first_episode_start
  FROM episodes_global_scoped
  GROUP BY person_key
),
mip_rr AS (
  SELECT * FROM min_interval_purchase
),
retention AS (
  SELECT
    mip_rr.person_key,
    COALESCE(sig.cnt_sessions_in_interval, 0) AS cnt_sessions_in_interval,
    fea.first_episode_start,
    mip_rr.min_interval_booking_date,
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(sig.cnt_sessions_in_interval, 0) >= 2
        OR fea.first_episode_start < mip_rr.min_interval_booking_date
      THEN 1 ELSE 0
    END AS returned
  FROM mip_rr
  LEFT JOIN sessions_in_interval_geo  sig USING (person_key)
  LEFT JOIN first_episode_all_scoped  fea USING (person_key)
),
rr_summary AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*)                            AS total_clients,
    SUM(returned)                       AS returned_clients,
    ROUND(100.0 * SUM(returned) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS retention_rate_pct
  FROM retention
),

-- 7) Полная история лидов (для скоростей/первого квала)
all_leads_person AS (
  SELECT
      cp.person_key,
      l.crm_id,
      l.creation_date_time,
      l.contact_in,
      l.date_contact,
      l.date_qual,
      l.date_booking,
      UPPER(TRIM(l.priority)) AS priority
  FROM mart.parent_child_leads l
  JOIN v_person_key cp
    ON cp.account_id      = l.account_id
   AND cp.contacts_amo_id = l.contacts_amo_id
),
first_creation AS (
  SELECT person_key, MIN(creation_date_time) AS first_creation
  FROM all_leads_person
  GROUP BY person_key
),
first_contact AS (
  SELECT person_key, MIN(date_contact) AS date_contact_first
  FROM all_leads_person
  WHERE contact_in = 1 AND date_contact IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY person_key
),
first_qual AS (
  SELECT person_key, MIN(date_qual) AS date_qual_first
  FROM all_leads_person
  WHERE date_qual IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY person_key
),
first_booking AS (
  SELECT person_key, MIN(date_booking) AS date_booking_first
  FROM all_leads_person
  WHERE date_booking IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY person_key
),
durations AS (
  SELECT
      fc.person_key,
      GREATEST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (ct.date_contact_first - fc.first_creation)) / 3600.0, 0) AS hours_to_contact,
      GREATEST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (q.date_qual_first     - fc.first_creation)) / 3600.0, 0) AS hours_to_qual,
      GREATEST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (b.date_booking_first  - fc.first_creation)) / 3600.0, 0) AS hours_to_booking
  FROM first_creation fc
  LEFT JOIN first_contact ct ON ct.person_key = fc.person_key
  LEFT JOIN first_qual    q  ON q.person_key  = fc.person_key
  LEFT JOIN first_booking b  ON b.person_key  = fc.person_key
),
first_qual_priority AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (alp.person_key)
      alp.person_key,
      alp.priority AS first_qual_priority
  FROM all_leads_person alp
  JOIN first_qual fq
    ON fq.person_key = alp.person_key
   AND alp.date_qual = fq.date_qual_first
  ORDER BY alp.person_key, alp.creation_date_time, alp.crm_id
),
agg_medians AS (
  SELECT
      pg.purchase_group,
      percentile_disc(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY d.hours_to_contact) AS median_hours_to_contact,
      percentile_disc(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY d.hours_to_qual)    AS median_hours_to_qual,
      percentile_disc(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY d.hours_to_booking) AS median_hours_to_booking
  FROM person_groups pg
  LEFT JOIN durations d ON d.person_key = pg.person_key
  GROUP BY pg.purchase_group
),
first_qual_share AS (
  SELECT
      pg.purchase_group,
      COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE fqp.first_qual_priority IS NOT NULL)               AS cnt_first_qual,
      ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE fqp.first_qual_priority = 'A')
            / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE fqp.first_qual_priority IS NOT NULL), 0), 2) AS pct_first_qual_a,
      ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE fqp.first_qual_priority = 'B')
            / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE fqp.first_qual_priority IS NOT NULL), 0), 2) AS pct_first_qual_b,
      ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE fqp.first_qual_priority = 'C')
            / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE fqp.first_qual_priority IS NOT NULL), 0), 2) AS pct_first_qual_c
  FROM person_groups pg
  LEFT JOIN first_qual_priority fqp ON fqp.person_key = pg.person_key
  GROUP BY pg.purchase_group
)

-- 8) Итог
SELECT
  ps.purchase_group                              AS "Группа",
  ps.contacts_count                              AS "Уник. контактов",
  ps.bookings_count                              AS "Количество брони",
  ps.total_deal_amount                           AS "Сумма всех сделок",
  ps.total_revenue                               AS "Сумма выручки",
  ps.avg_deal_amount                             AS "Ср. чек сделки",
  ps.avg_revenue                                 AS "Ср. чек выручки",
  ROUND(100.0 * ps.total_deal_amount
        / NULLIF(SUM(ps.total_deal_amount) OVER (), 0), 2) AS "Доля суммы сделок, %",
  am.median_hours_to_contact                     AS "От создания до контакта (медиана, ч.)",
  am.median_hours_to_qual                        AS "От создания до квала (медиана, ч.)",
  am.median_hours_to_booking / 24                AS "От создания до брони (медиана, д.)",
  COALESCE(fqs.cnt_first_qual, 0)                AS "Кол-во первых квалов",
  COALESCE(fqs.pct_first_qual_a,0)               AS "%A квалов",
  COALESCE(fqs.pct_first_qual_b,0)               AS "%B квалов",
  COALESCE(fqs.pct_first_qual_c,0)               AS "%C квалов",
  -- ↓↓↓ Индикатор RR по отчёту (одинаков для обеих строк группы)
  rr.total_clients                               AS "Клиентов (всего)",
  rr.returned_clients                            AS "Вернувшихся клиентов",
  rr.retention_rate_pct                          AS "Retention rate, %"
FROM purchases_summary ps
LEFT JOIN agg_medians      am USING (purchase_group)
LEFT JOIN first_qual_share fqs USING (purchase_group)
CROSS JOIN rr_summary rr
ORDER BY CASE ps.purchase_group WHEN 'Одна покупка' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END
